creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Franco.

For future submissions, feel free not to attach portlint/poudriere logs if you have QA'd the change using those tools, and instead just mention in your description:

* portlint: OK|WARN
* testport: OK (poudriere: archs, versions tested)
* unittest: OK (XXX tests passed in XXXs) - if it has a test target/suite
